Blightfire Moors

# May 23 2025 at 5:16 PM Rating: Decent
Crovaxxus
4 posts
Confirmed today these do drop from young slashclaw's too
▲ Page top
safe fall
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2014 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
subzero42
Scholar
26 posts
Stonebrunt mountains is the best place to farm high quality but unfortunately its a very ugly zone with high cliffs. Farming pelts in Stonebrunt = max safefall
▲ Page top
West karana...
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2018 at 7:34 AM Rating: Decent
ghamelon
Scholar
34 posts
I tried Stonebrunt, but you must travel somewhat between two mobs as long-distance vision is not too great because of the mountain (and I'm not a ranger...).

Instead I find West Karana to be a very good hunting place, especially about the guard tower in the middle of the map (loc: -781, -4276, +42). There is a lot of cat-like mobs (lions, lionesses,...), they drop quite often a High Quality Cat Pelt and they repop fast. (PS: I also killed the wolves and the bears in case they would be place holders for the cat-like mobs).

Another option is to slaughter the young pumas in their cavern at Crescent Reach. The drop rate is not that great, but this is compensated by the extreme repop rate and the facts that they are very quickly killed.

Edited, Jun 3rd 2018 9:39am by ghamelon
▲ Page top
West karana...
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2022 at 4:37 PM Rating: Good
Synicasm
View User Forum
Scholar
39 posts
Tried Stonebrunt too slow.. To big of area.

Tried West Karana as you suggested.. Way better plus the bonus of Spider, Spiderling, and Wolf and Bear pelts !!

"A Sleek Panther" in Nedaria's Landing. The cats are plentiful in the same area as the Serene Griffawns.

# Sep 05 2002 at 11:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753088743
32 posts
This is used in the tailoring of Tailored Quivers and reinforced leather armor.

see http://www.eqtraders.com for more details
▲ Page top
great plcas to find pelts
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 4:08 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252007837
Scholar
104 posts
if you are looking for quality cat pelts try stonebrunt mountains. The cats there drop pelts almost every time and often 2 at a time ... and they are never ruined ;) in half an hour of hunting (if you can kill quickly) its not unusual to have a stack of LQ ,half a stack of MQ and 5 or 6 HQ pelts.. very nice for a tailor in training or a smith needing pelts for padding.
▲ Page top
HQ Cat Pelt
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 12:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780563692
19 posts
These are used to make Fleeting Quiver I think; They go for about 300 on Ayonae Ro (If you're patient:)
▲ Page top
RE: HQ Cat Pelt
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 2:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249876136
34 posts
Actually you are mistaken friend. The HQ LION Skin is used for making the Fleeting Quiver. I made three of them - I WISH this common skin was used. )
